title: senecio loayzanus
intro: Senecio loayzanus, also known as 'Rat's Tail' or 'Groundsel Bush', is a succulent plant native to the Canary Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio loayzanus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use and preparation should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
